narrative:
Hudson 3-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,123 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.9 percentage points.
